2026-04-23T08:15:29.0571482Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T08:15:29.0572074Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T08:15:29.0572509Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T08:15:29.0572882Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T08:15:29.0573548Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:15:29.0573795Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T08:15:29.0573955Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-23T08:15:29.0574137Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T08:15:29.0574333Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-23T08:15:29.0574681Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-23T08:15:29.0575194Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:15:29.0575473Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
